output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 5/5.
Batch 1: Batch 1 executed for T1-T3. Added `defaultTool` to `useUserUIState`, promoted `video-editor` to the main tools section, extracted shared tool eligibility logic into `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts`, and refactored `ToolsPane` to use it. Verification passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check`, and `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts` (passing with existing React `act(...)` warnings). Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/two-related-changes-to-the-20260408-0320/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Batch 2 executed for T4 and T6. Added `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` to resolve the stored default tool at runtime with `toolRuntimeManifest` + `isToolEligible`, render `ReighLoading` while preferences load, and fall back to `travel-between-images` without rewriting stale preferences. Updated `ToolsPane` to expose a home button on every tool card, highlight the current default, and stop propagation on `pointerdown`, `pointerup`, and `click` so setting the default does not trigger navigation. Verification passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts` (the existing `useUserUIState` test still emits its prior React `act(...)` warnings). Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/two-related-changes-to-the-20260408-0320/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Batch 3 executed for T5. `src/app/routes.tsx` now funnels all landing entry points through the preference-aware redirect flow: `authRedirectLoader()` redirects to `/tools`, the non-web layout `/` route renders `<DefaultToolRedirect />`, and `/tools` renders `<DefaultToolRedirect />` inside `<Layout>`. Verification passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check -- src/app/routes.tsx`, `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx`, and a targeted grep confirming no remaining `/tools/travel-between-images` redirect targets in `routes.tsx` beyond the actual tool route/import. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/two-related-changes-to-the-20260408-0320/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Batch 4 verification executed for T7. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Full `npm run lint` did not pass because the repo already has a large unrelated eslint backlog (212 errors outside this feature area). Existing relevant test modules passed after a verification-only isolation fix in `src/app/routes.test.tsx`: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`. A literal live dev-server manual smoke run could not be completed in this sandbox because `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` failed with `listen EPERM`, and there is no installed browser automation stack. To still verify the requested behavior, I created a temporary jsdom smoke harness, ran it successfully for all four scenarios, and deleted it afterward. Those scenarios passed: video-editor renders in Main Tools, clicking the home icon updates default without navigation, reload resolves to the chosen tool, and a gated-off `character-animate` default falls back without overwriting the stored preference.
Batch 5: Batch 5 verification executed for T8. Full project test suite was run with `npm test`; it did not fully pass, finishing at `819` passing files and `27` failing files (`4205` passing tests, `54` failing tests). The failures are scattered across unrelated domains and include pre-existing missing-module/import-coverage tests, pane layout/context expectation mismatches, stale task payload contract tests, and unrelated repository/unit contract failures. The feature-area verification still passed: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts` succeeded, `git diff --check` on the touched files was clean, and a disposable reproduction script created and ran a temporary smoke test that confirmed the intended behavior before deleting both the script and temp test file. No regressions attributable to the default-tool/sidebar change set were found in this batch.
commands_run: npx eslint src/app/routes.tsx src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts

test -f src/app/__tmp__/default-tool-smoke.test.tsx && echo repo-temp-present || echo repo-temp-removed; test -f /tmp/default-tool-smoke.test.tsx && echo tmp-temp-present || echo tmp-temp-removed; git status --short src/app/routes.tsx src/app/routes.test.tsx src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx
test -f /tmp/default-tool-repro.mjs && echo script-present || echo script-removed; test -f src/app/__tmp__/default-tool-repro.test.tsx && echo temp-test-present || echo temp-test-removed

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `defaultTool: { toolId: string }` to `UISettings`, implemented `decodeDefaultTool()`, and routed `normalizeUserUISetting()` through the new branch. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

Changed `videoEditorSettings.paneSection` to `'main'` in the tool manifest. Verified statically that `ToolsPane` derives its Main Tools list from `paneSection === 'main'`, so video-editor now lands in that section; typecheck and eslint both passed.

Created `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts` and moved the existing `ToolsPane` visibility predicate into `isToolEligible()` without changing the character-animate/cloud gating behavior. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check`, and the existing `useUserUIState` test module.

Created `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` with both `defaultTool` and `generationMethods` hooks, loading gating via `ReighLoading`, runtime validation against `toolRuntimeManifest` plus `isToolEligible`, and fallback-only behavior with no repair write. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check -- src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

Added the default-tool hook to `ToolsPaneComponent`, threaded `isDefault` and `onSetDefault` through every `ToolCard`, and rendered the home button with propagation guards on `onPointerDown`, `onPointerUp`, and `onClick` so default-setting does not trigger the card's `onPointerUp` navigation. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check -- src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

Updated `src/app/routes.tsx` so `authRedirectLoader()` now redirects to `/tools`, and both the layout `/` route (PWA) and `/tools` route render `<DefaultToolRedirect />` inside `<Layout>`. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, `npx eslint src/app/routes.tsx src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx`, `git diff --check -- src/app/routes.tsx`, `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx`, and a targeted grep confirming no remaining `/tools/travel-between-images` redirect targets in `routes.tsx`.

Verification executed end-to-end. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Full `npm run lint` failed on a pre-existing repo-wide backlog (212 unrelated eslint errors across many files outside this feature). Existing relevant test modules now pass: `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts` and `src/app/routes.test.tsx` (the latter needed a verification-only mock update for `DefaultToolRedirect` and `VideoEditorPage` so the route-shape test stayed isolated from the full video-editor import graph). A live Vite smoke run could not be completed in this sandbox because `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` failed with `listen EPERM`, and there is no installed browser automation stack; to cover the requested behaviors anyway, a temporary jsdom smoke harness was created, run, and deleted, and it passed all four scenarios: video-editor under Main Tools, home-button click avoids navigation while updating default, reload lands on the chosen tool, and character-animate falls back while preserving the stored preference for later reactivation.
commands_run: npx eslint src/app/routes.tsx src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the full existing suite with `npm test`; it completed with `819` passing files / `27` failing files and `4205` passing tests / `54` failing tests. The failures are distributed across unrelated missing-module coverage checks, pane sizing assertions, stale task-contract expectations, and other domains outside the default landing tool/sidebar change set, so no feature-attributable regression surfaced there. Ran focused feature-area verification with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`, which passed, and `git diff --check` on the touched files was clean. For the required bug reproduction, executed a disposable script that generated a temporary smoke test covering: video-editor in Main Tools, home-button default-setting without navigation, default redirect to the chosen tool, and character-animate fallback without overwriting the stored preference; that smoke test passed and both temporary artifacts were deleted afterward.
commands_run: test -f /tmp/default-tool-repro.mjs && echo script-present || echo script-removed; test -f src/app/__tmp__/default-tool-repro.test.tsx && echo temp-test-present || echo temp-test-removed

git diff --check -- src/app/routes.tsx src/app/routes.test.tsx src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts src/shared/lib/tooling/toolManifest.ts src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed in `src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts` that `UISettings` now includes `defaultTool`, `decodeDefaultTool()` is defined alongside the other decoders, and `normalizeUserUISetting()` has a `case 'defaultTool'` branch delegating to it.

Confirmed `videoEditorSettings.paneSection` is `'main'` in `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolManifest.ts`. `ToolsPane` still partitions from `toolsUIManifest.filter((tool) => tool.paneSection === 'main')`, so video-editor now renders with Main Tools from that shared manifest wiring.

Confirmed `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts` matches the previously inlined env/cloud predicate, including the character-animate special case, and `ToolsPane.isToolVisible` now delegates to `isToolEligible()`.

Confirmed `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` uses both `useUserUIState('defaultTool', ...)` and `useUserUIState('generationMethods', ...)`, returns `ReighLoading` while either hook is loading, resolves the stored tool through `toolRuntimeManifest` and `isToolEligible`, falls back to `travel-between-images` on missing/ineligible tools, and never calls `update()`.

Confirmed the home button is rendered on every `ToolCard` in both Main and Assistant sections, stops propagation on `onPointerDown`, `onPointerUp`, and `onClick`, calls `onSetDefault()` from `onPointerUp`, uses the filled home icon for the default tool and a muted icon otherwise, and sets the required `aria-label`/`title` text.

Confirmed all three landing entry points now funnel through the preference-aware path: `authRedirectLoader()` redirects to `/tools`, the layout `/` route renders `<DefaultToolRedirect />` in PWA mode, and `/tools` also renders `<DefaultToolRedirect />`. The only remaining `/tools/travel-between-images` strings in `routes.tsx` are the actual tool route/import, not redirect targets.

Partial pass with environment limitations documented: typecheck passed; the existing relevant tests passed after a verification-only route-test mock fix; the four requested behaviors passed in a temporary smoke harness; full repo `npm run lint` is currently red on 212 unrelated pre-existing errors; and a true live dev-server manual smoke run was blocked by sandbox port permissions (`listen EPERM`) plus the absence of installed browser automation tooling.

Focused verification for the default landing tool change set passed: the route/UI state modules passed, the disposable reproduction smoke test passed, and no regressions attributable to this feature were found. The full project suite did not fully pass, but its `27` failing files / `54` failing tests are in unrelated areas such as missing-module coverage tests, pane/layout assertions, and stale task payload contract suites rather than the files touched by this change.
